---
title: "Razor Clam Harvest Estimation: Single-Beach Flow Diagram (ggplot2)"
author: "Matthew George"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

<!--
  Reproduces the simplified single-beach harvest-estimation flow diagram (the slide
  version) natively in ggplot2, so it can be regenerated and restyled inside the repo.

  It is a hand-laid schematic (geom_polygon rounded cards + geom_path elbow arrows +
  geom_text), NOT a data plot, so there are no input CSVs; everything is defined below.
  Dependencies: ggplot2 only (base R does the rest). `here` is used for the output path
  if available. `ragg`/cairo are used for crisp UTF-8 glyph rendering if available.

  Method reference: Effort_Expansion_Protocol.md sec 3; companion to
  03_analyses/20260713-harvest-figures/schematics/fig17_estimation_flow.png.
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# UTF-8-capable raster device so the math glyphs render (x, /, Sigma, arrow, middot).
options(bitmapType = "cairo")
use_ragg <- requireNamespace("ragg", quietly = TRUE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE,
  dev      = if (use_ragg) "ragg_png" else "png",
  dev.args = if (use_ragg) list() else list(type = "cairo"),
  fig.width = 13.333, fig.height = 8.33, dpi = 150, out.width = "100%"  # height matches the HS=1.25 layout
)
```

# -- 0. Toggles ----------------------------------------------------------------

```{r toggles}
save_fig <- TRUE   # write PNG + PDF to disk (set FALSE for quick preview-only reruns)

# Output folder: the harvest-figures schematics dir if the repo root is found, else ./figures
out_dir <- tryCatch(
  here::here("03_analyses", "20260713-harvest-figures", "schematics"),
  error = function(e) "figures"
)
fig_stem <- "razor_clam_estimation_flow_ggplot"
```

# -- 1. Packages ---------------------------------------------------------------

```{r packages}
## Load packages (template install loop; only ggplot2 is required)
load.lib <- c("ggplot2", "here")
install.lib <- load.lib[!load.lib %in% installed.packages()[, "Package"]]
for (lib in install.lib) install.packages(lib, dependencies = TRUE)
suppressMessages(invisible(lapply(load.lib, require, character.only = TRUE)))
library(grid)  # unit(), arrow() - base package, always available
```

# -- 2. Palette, glyphs, canvas ------------------------------------------------

```{r palette}
# Palette echoes the reference CF figure (amber daylight / navy night / cream / steel)
PAGE   <- "#FBF7EE"; INK      <- "#20303F"
NAVY   <- "#21395B"; NAVY_MED <- "#2F4E77"; NAVY_DK <- "#182B44"
AMBER  <- "#E09A3D"; AMBER_DK <- "#B06E22"
TAN    <- "#F2E1C0"; CREAM    <- "#FBF1D6"; CREAM2  <- "#FCF6E6"
STEEL  <- "#5C7EA8"; STEEL_LT <- "#E5ECF4"; STEEL_MD<- "#A9BCD2"
BODY_LT<- "#EEF2F6"; MUTED    <- "#6C7280"; LINE    <- "#3A4C63"; BORDER <- "#D9D2C4"

# Math glyphs built from code points -> locale-independent, ASCII source, no encoding risk
MUL <- intToUtf8(0x00D7)  # times
DIV <- intToUtf8(0x00F7)  # divide
SIG <- intToUtf8(0x03A3)  # Sigma
ARR <- intToUtf8(0x2192)  # arrow
MID <- intToUtf8(0x00B7)  # middot

W <- 1920; H <- 1080          # W = canvas width; H is recomputed from the layout (nodes chunk)
yy <- function(y) H - y       # convert a top-down (SVG-style) y to ggplot's y-up
CWU <- 2.85                   # ~data-units per character at a given text size (empirical)
```

# -- 3. Helper geometry + a card() builder -------------------------------------

```{r helpers}
bodies <- list(); headers <- list(); accents <- list()
tb <- list(); th <- list(); ti <- list(); arrows_l <- list(); elabels <- list(); bi <- 0

# corner arc, and rounded-rectangle / rounded-top polygons (plot coords)
arc <- function(cx, cy, a0, a1, r, n = 12) {
  t <- seq(a0, a1, length.out = n); data.frame(x = cx + r*cos(t), y = cy + r*sin(t))
}
rrect_up <- function(x0, y0, x1, y1, r, n = 12) rbind(
  arc(x1-r, y1-r, 0,      pi/2,   r, n), arc(x0+r, y1-r, pi/2,   pi,     r, n),
  arc(x0+r, y0+r, pi,     3*pi/2, r, n), arc(x1-r, y0+r, 3*pi/2, 2*pi,   r, n))
rtop_up <- function(x0, y0, x1, y1, r, n = 12) rbind(
  data.frame(x = x1, y = y0), arc(x1-r, y1-r, 0, pi/2, r, n),
  arc(x0+r, y1-r, pi/2, pi, r, n), data.frame(x = x0, y = y0))
wrapt <- function(s, width) paste(strwrap(s, width = width), collapse = "\n")

# Add one card. Coordinates are given SVG-style (xl, yt = top-left; y grows downward).
card <- function(xl, yt, w, h, title, hfill, bfill, sub = NULL, tag = NULL, accent = NULL,
                 tsize = 4.2, ssize = 3.7, subcol = INK, hh = 50, solid = FALSE,
                 tcol = "#FFFFFF", center = FALSE) {
  bi <<- bi + 1; x0 <- xl; x1 <- xl + w; y0 <- yy(yt + h); y1 <- yy(yt)
  if (solid) {
    headers[[length(headers)+1]] <<- cbind(rrect_up(x0,y0,x1,y1,16), grp = paste0("s",bi), fill = hfill)
  } else {
    bodies[[length(bodies)+1]]   <<- cbind(rrect_up(x0,y0,x1,y1,14), grp = paste0("b",bi), fill = bfill)
    headers[[length(headers)+1]] <<- cbind(rtop_up(x0, yy(yt+hh), x1, y1, 14), grp = paste0("h",bi), fill = hfill)
  }
  if (!is.null(accent))
    accents[[length(accents)+1]] <<- data.frame(xmin=x0, xmax=x1, ymin=yy(yt+hh)-5, ymax=yy(yt+hh), fill=accent)
  th_x <- if (center) (x0+x1)/2 else x0 + 16; hj <- if (center) 0.5 else 0
  tb[[length(tb)+1]] <<- data.frame(x=th_x, y=yy(yt+hh/2), label=title, size=tsize, colour=tcol, hjust=hj, vjust=0.5)
  if (!is.null(sub)) {
    wrapw <- floor((w - 34) / (ssize * CWU))
    th[[length(th)+1]] <<- data.frame(x=x0+16, y=yy(yt+hh+20), label=wrapt(sub, wrapw), size=ssize,
                                      colour=subcol, hjust=0, vjust=1)
  }
  if (!is.null(tag))
    th[[length(th)+1]] <<- data.frame(x=x1-15, y=yy(yt+hh/2), label=tag, size=3.05, colour="#FFFFFF", hjust=1, vjust=0.5)
}
addA <- function(pts, grp) {  # elbow arrow through a list of c(x, y) SVG-coord waypoints
  df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(pts, function(p) data.frame(x = p[1], y = yy(p[2]))))
  df$grp <- grp; arrows_l[[length(arrows_l)+1]] <<- df
}
addL <- function(x, y, label, colour = INK)   # operator label chip
  elabels[[length(elabels)+1]] <<- data.frame(x=x, y=yy(y), label=label, colour=colour)
```

# -- 4. Nodes ------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r nodes}
# ---- Vertical layout ---------------------------------------------------------
HS <- 1.25                         # bubble HEIGHT scale (1.00 = original heights)
IH <- 126 * HS; PH <- 126 * HS     # input-row / parameter-row heights
EH <- 104 * HS                     # Digger-trips (corrected daily effort) height
DH <- 100 * HS                     # daily harvest / imputed / wastage heights
MH <- 132 * HS                     # terminus height

# Row gaps are held fixed as the bubbles grow, so all spacing is preserved.
g_ip <- 52    # inputs      -> parameters
g_ps <- 78    # parameters  -> Digger-trips  (the gap widened in the previous step)
g_sh <- 60    # Digger-trips-> daily harvest
g_ht <- 84    # daily harvest -> beach-season terminus

IY <- 120                          # inputs top (SVG-style; y grows downward)
PY <- IY + IH + g_ip               # parameters top
EY <- PY + PH + g_ps               # Digger-trips top
HY <- EY + EH + g_sh               # daily harvest / imputed / wastage top
TY <- HY + DH + g_ht               # terminus top
H  <- TY + MH + 70                 # canvas height grows to fit (yy() reads this global)

CX <- c(50, 520, 990, 1460); CW <- 410; cen <- CX + CW/2

# Field inputs (row 1)
card(CX[1], IY, CW, IH, "Ingress / egress survey", NAVY, CREAM2, tag = "periodic", tsize = 3.8,
     sub = "Diggers tracked over the tidal cycle; sets the effort-vs-tide curve.")
card(CX[2], IY, CW, IH, "Beach count", NAVY, CREAM2, tag = "each dig day",
     sub = "People counted on each segment at the reference time before low water.")
card(CX[3], IY, CW, IH, "Creel interviews", NAVY, CREAM2, tag = "each dig day",
     sub = "Digging groups sampled as they leave: people, diggers, clams.")
card(CX[4], IY, CW, IH, "Wastage survey", NAVY, CREAM2, tag = "subset",
     sub = "Holes dug and dead / wasted clams counted on the beach.")

# Event-level parameters (row 2)
card(CX[1], PY, CW, PH, "Correction factor (CF)", AMBER, TAN, accent = AMBER_DK,
     sub = "Share of the day's diggers present at count time (~0.5-0.7); a preset from the ingress/egress surveys.")
card(CX[2], PY, CW, PH, "People at count", NAVY_MED, BODY_LT,
     sub = "People present at the snapshot, from the beach count.")
card(CX[3], PY, CW, PH, "Event creel rates", NAVY_MED, BODY_LT,
     sub = "CPUE = clams / diggers.  Digging fraction = diggers / people.")
card(CX[4], PY, CW, PH, "Wastage rate", NAVY_MED, BODY_LT,
     sub = "Dead clams / holes dug, pooled over the event.")

# Expansion + daily harvest (spine)
card(600, EY, 720, EH, paste("Digger-trips", MID, "corrected daily effort"), NAVY_DK, CREAM,
     accent = AMBER, tsize = 5.4, ssize = 4.2,
     sub = paste0("= people at count ", MUL, " digging fraction ", DIV, " CF. One count expanded to the whole day."))
card(600, HY, 720, DH, "Daily harvest (counted day)", NAVY_DK, CREAM, accent = AMBER,
     tsize = 5.4, ssize = 4.2, sub = paste0("= digger-trips ", MUL, " CPUE (clams)."))

# Uncounted-day lane
card(50, HY, 470, DH, paste("Uncounted day", ARR, "imputed harvest"), STEEL, STEEL_LT, accent = STEEL,
     tsize = 4.5, ssize = 3.7,
     sub = paste0("X_t = X_r ", MUL, " (D_t ", DIV, " D_r): scale a counted donor day, then ", MUL, " CPUE."))

# Wastage side-output
card(1400, HY, 470, DH, "Season wastage", NAVY_MED, BODY_LT, tsize = 4.5, ssize = 3.7,
     sub = paste0("= ", SIG, " (daily harvest ", MUL, " wastage rate). Reported alongside harvest."))

# Terminus
card(520, TY, 880, MH, "BEACH-SEASON HARVEST ESTIMATE", NAVY_DK, NAVY_DK, solid = TRUE,
     tsize = 7.2, center = TRUE, hh = 64)
ti[[1]] <- data.frame(x = 960, y = yy(TY + 100),
  label = paste0("= ", SIG, " daily harvest over all open dig days (counted + imputed)"),
  size = 5.0, colour = CREAM, hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5, face = 1)
ti[[2]] <- data.frame(x = 960, y = yy(TY + 128),
  label = paste0("the same ", SIG, " over digger-trips gives the beach-season effort"),
  size = 3.9, colour = STEEL_MD, hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5, face = 3)
accents[[length(accents)+1]] <- data.frame(xmin = 520, xmax = 1400, ymin = yy(TY)-2, ymax = yy(TY)+5, fill = AMBER)
```

# -- 5. Arrows + operator labels -----------------------------------------------

```{r arrows}
for (cx in cen) addA(list(c(cx, IY+IH), c(cx, PY)), paste0("ip", cx))     # inputs -> params
addA(list(c(cen[1], PY+PH), c(cen[1], EY+EH/2), c(600, EY+EH/2)), "cf")               # CF -> effort
addA(list(c(cen[2], PY+PH), c(cen[2], EY-14), c(760, EY-14), c(760, EY)), "ppl")      # people -> effort
addA(list(c(cen[3], PY+PH), c(cen[3], EY)), "dig")                                    # digging fraction
addA(list(c(1250, PY+PH), c(1250, PY+PH+16), c(1372, PY+PH+16), c(1372, HY+DH/2), c(1320, HY+DH/2)), "cpue")
addA(list(c(960, EY+EH), c(960, HY)), "eh")                                           # effort -> harvest
addA(list(c(960, HY+DH), c(960, TY)), "hs")                                           # harvest -> season
addA(list(c(285, HY+DH), c(285, (HY+DH+TY)/2), c(640, (HY+DH+TY)/2), c(640, TY)), "is")  # imputed -> season
addA(list(c(cen[4], PY+PH), c(cen[4], HY-45), c(1635, HY-45), c(1635, HY)), "wr")     # wastage rate -> wastage
addA(list(c(1320, HY+DH*0.7), c(1400, HY+DH*0.7)), "hw")                              # harvest -> wastage

addL(408,  EY+EH/2,   paste(DIV, "CF"),               AMBER_DK)
addL(1268, EY-20,     paste(MUL, "digging fraction"), INK)
addL(1402, EY+EH*0.9, paste(MUL, "CPUE"),             INK)
```

# -- 6. Assemble + draw --------------------------------------------------------

```{r build}
bodies_df  <- do.call(rbind, bodies);  headers_df <- do.call(rbind, headers)
accents_df <- do.call(rbind, accents); arrows_df  <- do.call(rbind, arrows_l)
tb_df <- do.call(rbind, tb); thh_df <- do.call(rbind, th)
ti_df <- do.call(rbind, ti); el_df  <- do.call(rbind, elabels)

p <- ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(data = bodies_df,  aes(x, y, group = grp, fill = fill), colour = BORDER, linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_polygon(data = headers_df, aes(x, y, group = grp, fill = fill), colour = NA) +
  geom_rect(data = accents_df, aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, fill = fill)) +
  geom_path(data = arrows_df, aes(x, y, group = grp), colour = LINE, linewidth = 0.8,
            lineend = "round", linejoin = "round",
            arrow = arrow(angle = 22, length = unit(0.22, "cm"), type = "closed")) +
  geom_text(data = tb_df,  aes(x, y, label = label, size = size, colour = colour, hjust = hjust, vjust = vjust),
            fontface = 2, lineheight = 0.9) +
  geom_text(data = thh_df, aes(x, y, label = label, size = size, colour = colour, hjust = hjust, vjust = vjust),
            fontface = 1, lineheight = 0.95) +
  geom_text(data = ti_df[ti_df$face == 1, ], aes(x, y, label = label, size = size, colour = colour,
            hjust = hjust, vjust = vjust), fontface = 1) +
  geom_text(data = ti_df[ti_df$face == 3, ], aes(x, y, label = label, size = size, colour = colour,
            hjust = hjust, vjust = vjust), fontface = 3) +
  geom_label(data = el_df, aes(x, y, label = label, colour = colour), fill = PAGE,
             label.size = 0.3, label.r = unit(0.12, "cm"), size = 4.3, fontface = 2) +
  annotate("text", x = 50, y = yy(60), label = "How one beach's razor clam harvest estimate is built",
           hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, size = 9.0, fontface = 2, colour = NAVY) +
  annotate("text", x = 50, y = yy(101), label = "From field data to the season total.",
           hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, size = 4.8, colour = MUTED) +
  scale_fill_identity() + scale_colour_identity() + scale_size_identity() +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 1, xlim = c(0, W), ylim = c(0, H), expand = FALSE) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(plot.background  = element_rect(fill = PAGE, colour = NA),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = PAGE, colour = NA))

p
```

# -- 7. Save -------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r save}
if (save_fig) {
  dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  png_path <- file.path(out_dir, paste0(fig_stem, ".png"))
  pdf_path <- file.path(out_dir, paste0(fig_stem, ".pdf"))
  fig_h <- 13.333 * H / W   # keep the saved aspect exact as the layout height changes
  # PNG: ragg if present, else base png with cairo (type is ignored by ragg - harmless)
  ggsave(png_path, p, width = 13.333, height = fig_h, dpi = 300, type = "cairo")
  # PDF: cairo_pdf renders the UTF-8 glyphs correctly
  ggsave(pdf_path, p, width = 13.333, height = fig_h, device = cairo_pdf)
  message("Wrote:\n  ", png_path, "\n  ", pdf_path)
}
```
